extras.command:
# All 49 step config.json files fixed. Now try the validation again.
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v3 \
    --only Yosys.JsonHeader \
    config.json 2>&1 | tail -8
